entities.name: CTA Rigor
entities.context: Framework for calibrating call-to-action directness on a scale of Soft | Balanced | Direct, defaulting to Balanced

entities.name: Warmth Score
entities.context: Metric for assessing thread tension level, used to determine if language should remain kind while keeping asks crisp

relationships.context: Warmth score is a trigger for adjusting CTA rigor level
